item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Twice a day I send my two adult sons and their partners a batch of memes, dad jokes, words of encouragement and affirmation, fart jokes, daily theme songs, advice, general silliness, and a bit of nightmare fuel. Here’s the latest. Try #2.
item.description:
Dad advice
This guy may be a turd sometimes, but this video makes me smile.
Forgive me if this was posted before.
True story.
Wait until the end
Good night. I love you. I’m proud of you. I’m grateful you’re in my life. Don’t forget to recycle the TP tubes.
Beware the cats. If you keep feeding them, they get this tall.
Instead, consider goat.
Laziest employee
I love you. I’m proud of you. I’m grateful you’re in my life. Make good choices and don’t endanger indigenous people.
I dub thee Squirtle
Beware the cats
Beware the cats
Get it? Doesn’t this drive you nuts?
I send this to my kids when I pun now.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: Progress pics after losing 32 pounds
item.description: I’ve lost 32 pounds since last July (down to 163 pounds, started at 195). When you lose weight this gradually, it’s easy to miss just how big the changes are, but seeing the before and after with these pics is just blowing my mind.
item.dc:creator: danishjuggler21

item.title: Today is my 8th anniversary at therapy at the gym.
item.description: Its a big milestone for me. I have made so much progress and I still have a ways to go. Looking forward to working hard and reaching my goals. I hope everyone is doing well and having a great day.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: Oh no! Not United Healthcare
item.description:
Apparently implicated for Medicare fraud. Their stock is getting Luigi'd as we speak and their CEO just abruptly quit.
Sauce and schadenfreude here - https://www.cnn.com/2025/05/15/business/unitedhealth-stock-ceo-investigation

item.title: It's my Cake Day!
item.description: It's been a while since I posted, but I'll be back dumping again for Pride Month. This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ #cakeday #derg #chonk #pride

I feel the need to draw another octopus mermaid for tomorrow! If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives

item.title: Our cat passed over the rainbow bridge today. It hurts. She is a pure bred Devon Rex named Rose
item.dc:creator: chevyfett

item.title: Mental Health Rerepost
item.description: OG post: http://imgur.com/gallery/D8CvKOn I got it from : https://imgur.com/gallery/5rp1Ci8 Last time I reposted this: Mental Health Repost https://imgur.com/gallery/SjcV16t Last time I got comments like therapist cuz they pay them to keep them alive. That's awesome for you, I hope more people are inspired by that top comment. I tried therapy when I was kid, was not for me and I have many other excuses. Others said their mom, that's cool too.. wish I still had that. My wife is my best friend, but things get tough cuz, guess what, even married people have issues too. Some people say we guys picked this up along the way with tiny comments like "why are you acting weird" or "man up". Whatever man, u go man up... u go act normal in public...imma just stay here at home, hide by myself, cry and self medicate until my wife or kids need me. Rinse and repeat mfs. Rinse and fucking repeat. Stay alive u fuckers... we need imgurians... we're a dying breed. I guess u fuckers are the only people I talk to about this shit as little as I do... ur fucking it u fuck face
item.dc:creator: falconca

item.title: After all, why not? Why shouldn’t I make room on my phone by dumping memes? Volume 9
item.description:
Y’all ready?
The burn means it’s working - Jesus probably
I struggle with this so much
I love yo mamma jokes! And Chuck Norris jokes…just jokes in general
Jealous, officer?
Sleep and I don’t get along very well
Feeling this right now actually
Eat it
Shhhhhhhhut the fuck up
Facts!
Stay fresh, cheesebags!

item.title: My Most Insane Fan Request
item.description:
My Most Insane Fan Request - Here’s just a short clip from the story I have wanted to tell you all for for so long, as it brings me such joy. Be sure to check out the full video below on my new YouTube channel (YAY!) then sit back and enjoy the tale of the gummy bear, the shrink ray, the wallet, and the request… https://youtu.be/vLXh23f2Z0s
Special shoutout to my longtime friend who created the gummy bear art for this thumbnail for me… Makes me want to put it on a t-shirt…
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: NegasonicAdultEMP

item.title: This masked feline felon is wanted for grand theft snack-o.
item.dc:creator: LunarLeopard

item.title: Small ADHD dump for my fellow neurodivergent folks out there.
item.description:
As a person with ADHD and a Navy Sailor, this one appeals to me on both levels.
Yes, this is it. My mind wanders hundreds of miles a minute through a vaguely interconnected chain of thoughts. You ever go down a YouTube rabbit hole where you started out looking for a video on how to tie a necktie but now it’s two hours later and you find yourself in the weird section of YouTube? That’s pretty much my brain. It’s either hyperfocused on one thing and one thing only, or attempting to focus on everything that ever was, is, or will be.
I am typically at least two of these at all times.
I am an introvert, but only because I am terrible at communicating like a normal person. I either don’t think before speaking and blurt out something weird resulting in an awkward silence whereupon I back away slowly and never attempt to communicate with that person again out of sheer embarrassment… or I overthink what I’m going to say and never find the right time to speak up and the moment passes. But I want to be an extrovert so fucking badly. I want desperately to be part of the conversation and make people laugh (not awkwardly).
Yes, many believe this is where ADHD comes from. We are remnants of a bygone era. Adapted to survive in this modern world, but not excel in it.
Yeah man, sorry, that’s just me.
Bro when I tell you, I was trying to work on updating my security clearance package today at work, but the website design is so friggin janky. I got so stressed out I had to go for a walk and clear my head. I spent the next few hours with an stress-induced migraine and a sour mood. Over a fucking website. Come on me, it’s not that big of a deal. It’s a government website, you should already know it’s going to be poorly built.
I have a very nice blender that I bought to make smoothies with. I brought one to work for my breakfast for several months in a row, then never made them again. I do still use it for salsa though. I make some pretty good homemade salsa.
I really gotta work on my chief package, since that’s due in a few weeks. But on the other hand… Fallout 76 is running a new special event until Tuesday. ?
It must not be DISTRACTING background noise, is the problem. Music I know by heart and can sing along to on autopilot while I work on what I need to work on is perfect. Otherwise I WILL get distracted. Like, a lot.
Yep.
Thankfully I don’t skin pick and I’ve learned that they’re not mad at me, it’s just that I can be a lot sometimes and not everyone is always ready to deal with that when it’s convenient for me.
When you meet someone whose weird vibe matches your weird vibe.
I should honestly just have this printed as business cards and have them on standby to hand out.
My spirit animal, the noble trash panda, doing what I’ve been doing for the past few months. Things are going to hell and aside from here on Imgur, nobody seems to even want to acknowledge it, much less work on doing something about it.
And just because he won’t just stop fucking talking about it and it’s kinda stressing me out, I made this meme today.
item.dc:creator: morningxafter

item.title: My co-workers are gonna hate me for this

item.title: Yep, reality-based fear
item.description: First time I've heard what another provider labeled as paranoia that I disagree with 100%. The feds literally said it. #Dalegribblewasright
